other_observers: Nick Komar; Brandon Percival origonally found the bird on January 14, 2006. Then Bill Maynard went and confirmed it. Then other observers like Tony Leukering went and saw the bird.
specific_location: Chico Basin Ranch, It is about 1 mile south of Hanover. Then there is an area with a lot of trees and Russian Olives and that is where it was hanging out.
description: The was a darker brown bird. It had a long curved bill that was mostly all black. Black streaks on the breast, belly, and it goes down onto the undertail coverts. It also has a gray face.Behaviors: Each time I saw the bird I heard it scratching on the ground first. Then about 5 to 10 minutes after listening to the scratching then it would fly up to the Russian Olives and sit there for a few minutes.Call: The only noise I heard from this bird is scratching through the grasses and leaves on the ground.Plumage: Unknown
